scripts.start: concurrently "cd backend && npm run start:dev" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.init-all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.init-APK: cd frontend && npm install @capacitor/core @capacitor/cli && npx cap init "Printer Ink" "com.myproject.app" --web-dir=out && npm install @capacitor/android && npx cap add android
scripts.updateAPK: cd frontend && npm run build && npx cap sync
scripts.createAPK: cd frontend && npx cap open android
